subject: [FEW HRS LEFT] Ends 11:59pm PT
body:
There's only a few hours left.

At 11:59pm PT tonight, the holy mother of free offers disappears forever.

90 day free trial of Skool becomes 14 day free trial with credit card required.

Plus you lock in a subscription rate of $9 per month for Skool for as long as you subscribe.

Last chance. Go here: skool.com/hormozi

Alex

PS - This is the last email / message / anything in this launch sequence. Now, back to my cave for the next big thing I give you.
